chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 41 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3522/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.3523/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 01-07-2021 Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant / accused Jameel Ahmed son of Allah Ditto seeks protective bail in Crime No.80 of 2009, registered at Police Station Sorah, District Khairpur, under Sections 365-A, 148, 149, PPC & 7 of Anti- Terrorism Act, 1997. It is, inter alia, contended by learned counsel for the applicant / accused that the applicant is prepared to surrender before the learned trial Court, but apprehends his arrest as NBW has been issued against him. It is further contended that the premises of the learned trial Court are cordoned off by the police. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of five days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile, operation of NBW, if any, is suspended for a period of five days. Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of five days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the learned trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case the applicant / accused fails to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of five days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the learned trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case the applicant / accused fails to surrender before the learned trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of along with the listed applications in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
